compiled_state.title: Delete dso-store backfill: ticket-archive-markers-backfill.sh (+ test)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
One-off backfill for tickets archived before the .archived marker convention — only applies to dso-era stores; a fresh rebar store can never need it (rebar is not dso-compatible). Only its test references it.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Script + tests/scripts/test-ticket-archive-markers-backfill.sh deleted
- [ ] Full suite green
